g.aria-label: X-axis titled 'n_plates' for a linear scale with values from −15 to 318
Y-axis titled 'source' for a discrete scale with 13 values: source_1, source_10, source_11, source_13, source_15, ending with source_9
Symbol legend titled 'plate_type' for fill color with 8 values: COMPOUND, COMPOUND_EMPTY, CRISPR, DMSO, ORF, ending with TARGET2
Title text 'JUMP plates per source, by plate type'
g.text: JUMP plates per source, by plate type
